title: The Shawshank Redemption
vibeSentence: Decades of quiet resistance; a friend waiting on the beach.
reasoning: Shawshank combines devastating realism about human cruelty with an ultimately redemptive narrative about hope as an active choice, yielding solidly positive valence despite years of darkness. The film demands careful engagement through complex symbolism (the posters, the geology, the hammer) and thematic density, but its deliberate pacing keeps physiological arousal low while maximizing cognitive and emotional absorption—you're solving Andy's puzzle across decades.
